solana.description: Solana trading, price analysis, and leveraged positions

plugins.name: trader
plugins.description: Solana trading agent — open/close leveraged perpetual positions and spot swap SOL/USDC via Jupiter

plugins.name: price
plugins.description: Solana price analysis — real-time Pyth prices, RSI/MACD/Bollinger signals, pivot-point levels, Fear & Greed sentiment, CoinGecko history

skills.name: solana/price
skills.description: Solana price data and analysis — fetch from Pyth, analyze history, run RSI/MACD/Bollinger signals, compute S/R levels, Fear & Greed sentiment.

skills.name: solana/trade
skills.description: Solana trading via Jupiter — wallet balance, swap quotes, buy/sell SOL, perpetual positions (open/close/pnl).

skills.name: solana/perps
skills.description: Adaptive leveraged perpetual trading workflow. Market scan → structure analysis → enter → ride → exit. Default 5x leverage.

skills.name: solana/swap
skills.description: Simple SOL/USDC dip-and-high spot swapper. 1h price history, staggered entries, profit-checked sells. Logs to swap-ledger.jsonl.

audio.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, and voice synthesis via ElevenLabs

plugins.name: elevenlabs
plugins.description: ElevenLabs speech — batch transcribe audio files (STT), convert text to audio (TTS), and speak text aloud

skills.name: audio/transcribe
skills.description: Transcribe audio files to text using ElevenLabs STT. Directory of audio → individual .txt → combined transcript.

skills.name: audio/narrate
skills.description: Convert text to speech audio using ElevenLabs TTS. Default voice: Achar, model: eleven_multilingual_v2.

skills.name: audio/speak
skills.description: Speak text aloud immediately using ElevenLabs. Plays audio via mpv/ffplay.

image.description: AI image generation from text prompts via Replicate

plugins.name: replicate
plugins.description: Replicate AI media — generate images (seedream, banana) and create videos from images (wan-video)

skills.name: image/generate
skills.description: Generate images from .txt prompt files using Replicate. Default model: seedream ($0.035/img). Also supports banana (legacy).

video.description: AI video generation from images via Replicate wan-video

skills.name: video/generate
skills.description: Generate short .mp4 videos from images + prompt .txt files using wan-video on Replicate.

skills.name: text/translate
skills.description: Translate text to another language (default: Urdu). Keeps English technical terms. Optimized for TTS output.

skills.name: content/create
skills.description: Full content pipeline: audio → transcript → story → translate → images → video → narration.

travel.description: Flight search, accommodation booking via browser automation

skills.name: travel/search-flights
skills.description: Search Google Flights for cheap flights between cities. Browser automation via playwright-cli.

skills.name: travel/search-stays
skills.description: Search Airbnb for best value entire homes/apartments. Compares price, rating, amenities.

plugins.name: browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli — navigate, click, fill forms, take screenshots, manage sessions

skills.name: browser/automate
skills.description: Browser UI automation — navigate, click, fill forms, read text, take screenshots. UI only, no APIs.

skills.name: usage
skills.description: Show plugin and skill usage stats — total calls, tokens, and cost estimates from the PostToolUse hook log.
